reason: Check raw source scan implementation stays behind DataSource/local safe boundary.
Check scan scheduling UI is clear without disrupting default media-library layout.
Check full/incremental scheduler status, interval, cooldown and fault isolation behavior.
Check config/cache/status types and sensitive extra sanitization.
Check watcher lifecycle and Tauri event cleanup.
Check required frontend/Rust/package validation and Windows exe refresh.
Check docs align with dual scan scheduler and raw source behavior.
Check no local absolute paths or sensitive provider URLs leak through watcher/cache/logs.
Check source event to scheduler to cache to UI data flow.
